title: crepis multicaulis subsp. multicaulis
intro: Crepis multicaulis subsp. multicaulis, also known as smooth hawk's beard, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antimicrobial agent, and stimulate digestion. Its health benefits include treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as helping to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Crepis multicaulis subsp. multicaulis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its roots can be dried and used as a powder in various herbal preparations.
